name: GMGN On-chain Analytics
description: Multi-chain memecoin analytics via gmgn-cli: trending tokens, token security, holders, traders, smart-money / KOL trade tracking. Real-time, no cache. Backed by GMGN OpenAPI (https://gmgn.ai/ai). Solana focus; supports bsc/base/eth too. Hunter uses trending+smart-money for screening; Argus uses token-security for pre-deploy veto.
author: internal
